mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RECALL_DIARY(member_no, title, memo, created_dt, updated_dt) VALUES (#{memberNo}, #{request.title}, #{request.memo}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE RECALL_DIARY SET deleted_dt = NOW() WHERE diary_no = #{diaryNo} AND deleted_dt IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT diary_no as diaryNo , member_no as memberNo , title , memo , DATE(created_dt) as createdDt , DATE(updated_dt) as updatedDt FROM RECALL_DIARY WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND DATE(created_dt) = #{date} AND deleted_dt IS NULL

SELECT diary_no AS diaryNo , member_no AS memberNo , title , memo , DATE(created_dt) AS createdDt , DATE(updated_dt) AS updatedDt FROM RECALL_DIARY WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND deleted_dt IS NULL ORDER BY created_dt DESC

SELECT diary_no AS diaryNo , member_no AS memberNo , title AS title , memo AS memo , DATE(created_dt) AS createdDt , DATE(updated_dt) AS updatedDt FROM RECALL_DIARY WHERE diary_no = #{diaryNo} AND deleted_dt IS NULL
